# Task Guidelines

## Using AKM (when AKM_STASH_DIR is set)

If you see AKM_STASH_DIR in your environment, a knowledge stash is available.
You MUST search it before attempting the task:

1. `akm search rust async` — find relevant skills and knowledge
2. `akm show <ref>` — read the full asset if a relevant result is returned
3. Apply what you learned, then write your solution
4. `akm feedback <ref> --positive` or `--negative` when done (only if you showed an asset)

Do not skip step 1. If no relevant asset is found, proceed with your own knowledge.
